data.name: Hero.Subtitle
data.value: Learn words through flashcards, track your progress and share bundles with others.

data.name: Feature.SectionTitle
data.value: The best way to enrich your vocabulary

data.name: Feature.Cards.Translation.Text
data.value: A simple "word-translation" pair is not enough for fluency. We created smart flashcards that immerse you in context and help you feel the vocabulary.

data.name: Feature.Bundles.Text
data.value: Group words into thematic bundles for a systematic approach. Create your own unique collections for specific goals or use ready-made materials from the community to save time searching.

data.name: Feature.Progress.Text
data.value: Forget the feeling of being stuck in place. The system continuously analyzes your quiz performance and displays the mastery level of each word.

data.name: Feature.Community.Text
data.value: Don't want to collect words one by one? Check out the Community Hub. Find readymade unique collections from other users: from strict academic vocabulary to the latest internet trends.

data.name: CTA.Subtitle
data.value: Join and learn new words every day.
